primary_test: Does Kibitz correctly identify 25...h6!! as the zugzwang-creating move and explain the paralysis mechanism, not just call it a strong move?

must_flag_moves.note: 25...h6!! — Black's 25th move (2*25=50). The quiet pawn move that creates complete zugzwang; White resigned.

should_flag_moves.note: 21...Rxf2 — Black's 21st move (2*21=42). The rook sacrifice that sets up the zugzwang. Kibitz should recognize this as the start of the winning sequence, not just h6.

forbidden_claims: White has many good replies after h6
